AI Market Analysis & ForecastFALLBACK
Rule-Based Analysis • 2026-04-13T15:36
📉 bearish
Confidence: MEDIUM
The ETB black market rate is currently 185.00 ETB/USD, representing a 18.2% premium over the official rate of 156.56 ETB. Strong selling pressure indicates USDT supply increase.
📊 Why the 18.2% Gap Between Black Market & Official Rate?
The 18.2% gap exists primarily due to foreign currency shortage in official banking channels, forcing businesses to seek USD through parallel markets at premium rates.
🔴 Black Market Drivers
  • High demand for USD from importers and businesses
  • Limited forex availability through official channels
  • Diaspora remittance preferences for better rates
